description: As a Payroll and Timekeeping Clerk, you have been asked by the HR Director to configure a new leave type in Odoo to formally track 'Work From Home' requests under the company's new remote work policy. Create a new Leave Type named 'Work From Home' with 'Approval' set to 'By Employee's Approver' and 'Requires Allocation' set to 'Yes'. Leave all other fields at their default values. The Odoo instance is available at http://localhost:8069.
